message:
🐛 Fix mermaid diagram rendering and add coding agent components (#1283) - Fix MermaidComponent: use mermaid.render() API instead of innerHTML + mermaid.run() which failed because
tags corrupted the syntax - Add mermaid code fence preprocessing in page.tsx to convert ```mermaid blocks to JSX before compileMdx (the remark-mermaid plugin was installed but never wired up) - Make MermaidComponent theme-aware: detects dark/light mode and re-renders on toggle via MutationObserver - Update architecture diagram: add Claude Code CLI and GPT API nodes, shorten labels to prevent truncation Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson

files.patch:
@@ -41,22 +41,27 @@ The console consists of 7 components working together. See [Configuration](confi ```mermaid graph TB - GitHub["GitHub OAuth
(Authorization Server)"] - Backend["KubeStellar Console Backend :8080
API Handlers · Auth (OAuth Client) · Claude AI · WebSocket"] - Browser["User Browser
React + Vite SPA"] - MCP["MCP Bridge
kubestellar-ops + kubestellar-deploy"] - K8s["Kubernetes Clusters
cluster-1 · cluster-2 · ..."] - Agent["kc-agent :8585
Local Agent (user's machine)"] - - Browser -- "1. initiates OAuth flow" --> Backend - Browser -- "2. user authorizes on GitHub" --> GitHub - GitHub -- "3. issues access token
(in exchange for auth code)" --> Backend + GitHub["GitHub OAuth"] + Backend["Console Backend :8080"] + Browser["User Browser"] + MCP["MCP Bridge"] + K8s["Kubernetes Clusters"] + Agent["kc-agent :8585"] + CLI["Claude Code CLI"] + API["GPT API"] + + Browser -- "OAuth flow" --> Backend + Browser -- "authorize" --> GitHub + GitHub -- "access token" --> Backend Backend -- "session JWT" --> Browser + Backend -- "REST / WebSocket" --> Browser Browser -- "WebSocket" --> Agent - Backend -- "REST / WebSocket API" --> Browser - Backend -- "kubeconfig credentials" --> MCP + Backend -- "kubeconfig" --> MCP MCP -- "kubeconfig" --> K8s - Agent -- "kubectl / kubeconfig" --> K8s + Agent -- "kubectl" --> K8s + Agent -- "MCP protocol" --> CLI + CLI -- "kubestellar-ops" --> K8s + API -- "read-only queries" --> Backend ``` **Credential flows:**
